title: AquaVision-Dynamic Transparent Water
description: Water visibility dynamically changes with brightness—higher brightness makes water clearer, while lower brightness provides a more realistic look.
body:
Aqua Vision is a lightweight Minecraft shader that temporarily hides water blocks when you view them from the outside, giving you an unobstructed view of oceans, lakes, and rivers. Once you enter the water, it returns to its normal appearance, preserving the natural underwater experience.    
(Warning ⚠) Recommended for private servers, creative builds, and cinematic use.
